title: One Pager Example
subtitle: Compact executive summary, proposal, or briefing.

sections.heading: One Pager in use
sections.body: This one-pager proposes a small gallery-quality improvement with enough context for an executive or reviewer to approve the work.

cards.title: Problem
cards.body: Clickable examples existed, but many pages only proved the renderer could output HTML.

cards.title: Proposal
cards.body: Make every template demo content-rich and visually representative.

cards.title: Measure
cards.body: Every output should contain template-specific copy and at least one meaningful primitive.

sections.heading: Decision request
sections.body: Approve the gallery refresh as part of the skill contract. The examples become living documentation and regression coverage.
